_comment: LCG-028 — Profile snippet to enable LangChain + LangGraph adapters. Merge the providers block into your existing profile (e.g. config/profiles/<your-profile>.json). The defaults are secure (default-off, default-deny, dry_run, local-only).
_decision_log: LCG-001: CodeCompass is the only retriever source; LangChain/LangGraph are execution layers, not retrievers.
LCG-002: Default-deny policy: empty allowed_tools blocks everything (covered by WorkflowPolicyGate).
LCG-005: Per-task audit isolation via WorkflowAuditLog.snapshot(); shared log must not leak across tasks.
LCG-008: Live execution requires the matching framework extra (ananta[langchain] or ananta[langgraph]).
